_comment: System-wide defaults for tab-atelier. Read by both the desktop and headless variants as a fallback when no per-user preferences.json exists at $HOME/.local/tab-atelier/preferences.json (the GUI Preferences dialog writes there). Per-user settings always win. Edit this file and restart (systemctl restart tab-atelier-headless, or relog for the GUI) to apply. Unknown keys are ignored.
_font_comment: GUI terminal font. Set 'font_family' to a concrete installed monospace (e.g. 'JetBrains Mono', 'DejaVu Sans Mono') and optionally 'font_size' (px) if the default looks badly spaced. Unset -> zed settings.json (ui_font_family) -> fontconfig 'monospace'. Headless ignores this.
